core_mechanism: renormalization-group / finite-size-scaling analysis of the limiting distribution of the extreme (maximum) of many random variables, in which a finite-size convergence exponent controls the leading-order correction to the limit law and subdivides the universality classes
brief_reason: The abstract introduces a renormalization method for the finite-size convergence and shape correction of extreme-value limit distributions, with the convergence exponent both subdividing the iid universality classes and setting the leading finite-size correction function.
